prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划:
2025年该校在北京市综合科类最低录取位次约5304名（物理、化学必选专业组），为近年可获取的基准位次。
2. 【招生计划】该校在北京市综合科类招生计划2025年为47人，2026年增至50人，扩招约6.4%，小幅缓解竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京师范大学（珠海校区 ）为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，共享北京师范大学软科排名，2026年软科主榜约第19名，属全国顶尖师范类高校；2026年高考周期内北京师范大学声 誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及学校管理类舆情回应，无重大负面事件；抖音热度排名第37位（较热），短视频平台关注度处于中上水平，对报考热度有一定正向支撑。2022年曾 出现投档线异常信号（江西位次大幅下降），但属主校区且距今较远，对2026年北京考生心理影响有限；共享北京师范大学A+学科：教育学、心理学、中国语言 文学、中国史、地理学、马克思主义理论；A级学科：数学、环境科学与工程、生态学、统计学、体育学、外国语言文学。珠海校区开设的人文科学试验班（含汉语言文学、英语 、历史学）、社会科学试验班（含经济学、金融科技）、数学类、理科试验班（含地理科学、心理学、生物科学、化学）等专业与上述优势学科高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据显示：计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业高热推荐；师范/教育类呈分化观望态势；金融/财经/经济类分化观望。珠海校区招生专业涵盖人文 社科与理工科，其中数学类、金融科技等方向与当前热门专业大类相关。北京市2026年高考报名总人数约84,900人，较2025年65,434人增长约29.7%，考生规模大幅增加，竞争显 著加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次约5304名、2026年扩招约6.4%（小幅缓解竞争）、北京市考生总数大幅增长约29.7%（显著 加剧竞争）、学校声誉中性偏稳、抖音热度较热等因素，竞争加剧效应强于扩招缓解效应，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年略有前移（位次数字减小）。预测最低位次约5457名 ，区间4957–5957名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 人文科学试验班（珠海校区）（含汉语言文学、英语、历史学）
- 社会科学试验班（珠海校区）（含经济学（数据科学）、金融科技）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 数学类（珠海校区）（含数学与应用数学、物理学、系统科学与工程、数据科学与大数据技术、人工智能（创新实验班）、应用统计学）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 理科试验班（珠海校区）（含地理科学、心理学、生物科学、化学）
- 管理科学（珠海校区）（钱学森智能管理卓越人才实验班）
- 教育学（珠海校区）（北师大教育学、北理AI联合学位培养项目）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间4957–5957名内，建议以二档数学类为主攻方向（学科评估A级且专业热度推荐），一档人文科学试验班和社会科学试验班可冲刺（需位次明显优于区间下限）， 三档理科试验班和教育学联合学位项目作为保底选择。北师大珠海校区共享北师大A+学科资源，教育学、心理学、中国语言文学等王牌专业报考价值高。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
In 2025, the minimum admission ranking for this university in the Beijing comprehensive category is approximately 5304 (for the physics and chemistry required major group), which is the baseline ranking available in recent years.
2. [Enrollment Plan] The enrollment plan for this university in the Beijing comprehensive category is 47 students in 2025, increasing to 50 students in 2026, an expansion of about 6.4%, slightly alleviating competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Normal University (Zhuhai Campus) is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, sharing the Soft Science ranking of Beijing Normal University. In 2026, the Soft Science main ranking is approximately 19th, making it a top national normal university. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation of Beijing Normal University is neutral/mixed, mainly involving university management-related public opinion responses, with no major negative events. Douyin popularity ranking is 37th (relatively hot), with short video platform attention at an upper-middle level, providing some positive support for application popularity. In 2022, there was an abnormal signal in the admission cutoff line (a significant drop in Jiangxi ranking), but this belongs to the main campus and is relatively distant, having limited psychological impact on Beijing candidates in 2026. It shares Beijing Normal University's A+ disciplines: Education, Psychology, Chinese Language and Literature, Chinese History, Geography, and Marxist Theory; A-level disciplines: Mathematics, Environmental Science and Engineering, Ecology, Statistics, Physical Education, and Foreign Languages and Literatures. The majors offered at Zhuhai Campus, such as Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class (including Chinese Language and Literature, English, History), Social Sciences Experimental Class (including Economics, Financial Technology), Mathematics, and Science Experimental Class (including Geography, Psychology, Biological Sciences, Chemistry), are highly correlated with the above advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other engineering majors are highly recommended; Teacher/Education majors show a differentiated wait-and-see trend; Finance/Finance/Economics majors are differentiated and wait-and-see. The majors offered at Zhuhai Campus cover humanities, social sciences, and science and engineering, among which Mathematics, Financial Technology and other directions are related to current popular major categories. The total number of candidates registered for the 2026 Beijing college entrance examination is approximately 84,900, an increase of about 29.7% compared to 65,434 in 2025, with a significant increase in the number of candidates and intensified competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of approximately 5304, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 6.4% (slightly alleviating competition), the significant increase in the total number of Beijing candidates by about 29.7% (significantly intensifying competition), the neutral and stable school reputation, and the relatively hot Douyin popularity, the competition intensification effect is stronger than the expansion alleviation effect. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will be slightly higher than in 2025 (ranking number decreases). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5457, with a range of 4957–5957.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class (Zhuhai Campus) (including Chinese Language and Literature, English, History)
- Social Sciences Experimental Class (Zhuhai Campus) (including Economics (Data Science), Financial Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Mathematics (Zhuhai Campus) (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Physics, Systems Science and Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Artificial Intelligence (Innovation Experimental Class), Applied Statistics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Science Experimental Class (Zhuhai Campus) (including Geography, Psychology, Biological Sciences, Chemistry)
- Management Science (Zhuhai Campus) (Qian Xuesen Intelligent Management Excellence Talent Experimental Class)
- Education (Zhuhai Campus) (Beijing Normal University Education, Beijing Institute of Technology AI Joint Degree Training Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 4957–5957, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Mathematics as the main direction (A-level discipline assessment and popular major recommendation). Tier 1 Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class and Social Sciences Experimental Class can be attempted as reach schools (requiring rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range). Tier 3 Science Experimental Class and Education joint degree program serve as safety choices. Beijing Normal University Zhuhai Campus shares the A+ discipline resources of Beijing Normal University, and the flagship majors such as Education, Psychology, and Chinese Language and Literature have high application value.
